authController.js.description: Handles user authentication, registration, login, approval, and employee management

campaignController.js.description: Manages campaign creation, retrieval, launching, and deletion with tracking link injection and domain rotation logic

domainController.js.description: Handles domain management including verification, DKIM generation, test sending, and importing from external providers

eventController.js.description: Provides Server-Sent Events (SSE) endpoint for real-time delivery events and mail queue management

monitoringController.js.description: Handles DMARC report retrieval and summary

seedRecipientController.js.description: Manages seed recipients for email warmup acceleration

smtpConfigController.js.description: Handles SMTP configuration management including creation, retrieval, updating, deletion, and testing

statsController.js.description: Provides campaign statistics and overview analytics

warmupController.js.description: Manages email warmup schedule and rate limiting

User.js.description: User model with bcrypt password hashing, role-based access control, and approval workflow

Campaign.js.description: Campaign model with recipient schema, delay settings, attachments, and domain references

Domain.js.description: Domain model with sender email validation, DNS verification fields, and usage tracking

DeliveryEvent.js.description: Delivery event model for tracking email delivery status from Postfix logs

DmarcReport.js.description: DMARC report model for email authentication monitoring

SeedRecipient.js.description: Seed recipient model for warmup acceleration tracking

SmtpConfig.js.description: SMTP configuration model with encrypted password fields (AES-256-GCM)

Tracking.js.description: Tracking model for email opens, clicks, and unsubscribes with TTL index

WarmupConfig.js.description: Singleton warmup configuration model with phased daily limits and slot reservation system

crypto.js.description: AES-256-GCM encryption/decryption utilities for SMTP passwords

dnsVerifier.js.description: DNS verification utilities for MX, SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records

emailVerifier.js.description: Email validation utilities including MX record checking and bounce categorization

postfixLogParser.js.description: Parses Postfix container logs for delivery events and maintains real-time event stream via SSE

queue.js.description: BullMQ queue configuration for email sending jobs

relays.js.description: Relay pool for global SMTP configurations (Brevo/AWS SES)

api.js.description: Main API route aggregator mounting all controller endpoints with protection middleware

tracking.js.description: Tracking routes for email open, click, and unsubscribe events with transparent GIF pixel

server.js.description: Express server setup with middleware, routes, Postfix log parser integration, and graceful shutdown

App.jsx.description: Main React application component handling authentication, routing, and state management

ComposeView.jsx.description: Campaign creation UI with recipient parsing, domain selection, delay settings, attachments handling, and rich text editor

CampaignDetailView.jsx.description: Detailed view of a campaign with statistics, delivery events, and performance metrics

DomainsView.jsx.description: Domain management UI with list view, bulk import functionality, verification, and DKIM generation

DomainDetailView.jsx.description: Detailed view of a domain with DNS records, verification status, test delivery, and usage statistics

EventsView.jsx.description: Real-time delivery event monitoring via Server-Sent Events (SSE) with filtering and auto-scroll

SeedsView.jsx.description: Seed recipient management for warmup acceleration with bulk import and toggle/delete functionality

EmployeeView.jsx.description: Employee management with pending approvals tab and active employees tab

EmployeeDetailView.jsx.description: Employee profile showing campaigns and statistics

RulesView.jsx.description: Email deliverability rules and tips in English and Bengali

SettingsView.jsx.description: SMTP configuration management form with testing and provider presets

Sidebar.jsx.description: Navigation sidebar with main menu, preferences, admin employee management, and user info/logout

api.js.description: API fetch wrapper with token integration and automatic logout handler
